summary: Adjusted the opening to pick up the still-lit galley from the previous chapter and to give chapter 13 a distinct entry construction from the visible chapter 14 opening. No beat-level or causality changes were made.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph around Jet entering the galley with the light still on, tying the chapter entry back to chapter 12's closing image.
Changed the opening scaffold from a personified refrigerator inventory to a Jet-centered action beat so it no longer echoes chapter 14's personified ship opening.
